title: Mapping Africa's EO Value Stream
summary: Africa’s Earth Observation ecosystem is rapidly evolving, shifting from dependence to strategic autonomy. This report traces how raw satellite data becomes real socioeconomic value through processing, analysis, and application across key sectors.

title: The Stars Just Called Nigeria: A Civilian Space Seat Is Up for Grabs
summary: The space race just got a massive upgrade, and this time, the ticket is going to an everyday person. Specifically, a Nigerian civilian is about to be seated on a rocket, shattering old barriers and making history for the entire continent.

title: Nexus Space Ltd: 2026 Strategic Focus
author: Ibukun Adebolu, PhD
summary: “Nexus Space Ltd unveils its 2026 Strategic Priorities — a bold roadmap advancing Africa’s climate resilience, satellite engineering capability, and space-driven innovation through high-impact programs and partnerships.”
